caption: Amara's first day of 3rd grade! 🎒 She was so excited she was up before me. Proud doesn't even begin to cover it. #backtoschool #proudmama #amara
Isaiah figured out how to pump his legs on the swing all by himself today! 🙌 This boy is growing up way too fast. #isaiah #backyard #bigboy
Jaylen scored his first goal of the season! ⚽ David and I were screaming our heads off on the sideline lol. #soccer #jaylen #proudmama
Fall Sunday at Grandma and Grandpa Baker's 🍂 These four are running that backyard like they own it. Best afternoons right here. #familytime #biloxi #grandkids

Destiny turned 5 last week and she requested a butterfly cake 🦋 My mama came through and baked the most beautiful thing I have ever seen. Happy belated birthday baby girl! #destiny #birthday #familylove
Grandpa Baker raking leaves while these little helpers jump right back in 😂❤️ Some traditions never get old. #fall #familyfun #grandpa
Church Sunday with my babies 👑 They cleaned up so nice. Pastor Williams called them the joy of the congregation and I almost cried right there in the pew. #sunday #church #familylove #biloxi
Thanksgiving 2025 🦃 Grandma Doreen outdid herself this year. Amara helped make the cornbread dressing and she has not stopped talking about it since. #thanksgiving #family #biloxi #blessed
Jaylen's 9th birthday! 🎂 He asked Grandpa to pitch to him in the backyard all afternoon. Those two were out there for two hours 😭❤️ #jaylen #birthday #baseball #grandpalife
Christmas morning at Grandma and Grandpa's 🎄 The chaos, the wrapping paper everywhere, Isaiah's face when he saw his fire truck — I live for mornings like this. #christmas #family #biloxi #grandkids
New Year's Eve with the fam 🎆 Grandpa Baker fell asleep before midnight but we celebrated anyway 😂 Love him so much. #nye #family #biloxi
Amara's 8th birthday! 🎂🎉 My firstborn grandbaby is 8 years old. We took her to get her nails done and she picked the most sparkly pink you have ever seen. #amara #birthday #biloxi #familylove
Backyard cookout with Uncle Curtis in town 🔥 Grandpa fired up that grill and cooked enough food to feed the whole neighborhood. Skeeter even came by! #cookout #family #biloxi #summer

Isaiah's 5th birthday! 🎂🚒 This boy loves firetrucks more than anything. Grandpa took him to the fire station and the firefighters let him sit in the truck. He talked about it for a week. #isaiah #birthday #biloxi
Valentine's Day cards from all four grandkids to Grandpa ❤️ He has them lined up on the kitchen counter and I know he will not throw them away ever. #valentinesday #familylove #grandpa #biloxi

Spring Saturday at the park 🌸 All four of them on the jungle gym at the same time — Grandpa watching from the bench with the biggest smile on his face. @john_baker_ms we see you! #spring #park #grandkids #biloxi
Easter Sunday 2026 🐣 Egg hunt in Grandma and Grandpa's backyard. Destiny found the golden egg and did a whole victory lap around the yard 😂 #easter #family #biloxi #grandkids
Jaylen's spring baseball game 🧢⚾ Grandpa Baker was the loudest person in those bleachers and nobody is surprised. #baseball #jaylen #grandpa #biloxi
Mother's Day 2026 💐 My Mama and me. This woman raised me right and now she spoils my babies rotten. I would not have it any other way. @doreen_baker_ms love you Mama! #mothersday #family #biloxi
Summer is here and Grandpa opened up the sprinkler in the backyard ☀️💦 These kids are soaked and screaming and it is the best thing ever. #summer #backyard #grandkids #biloxi
Amara helped Grandpa water his garden this morning 🌱 She is so gentle with every plant. Says she wants to be a botanist. @john_baker_ms your little helper! #garden #amara #grandpa #biloxi
Four grandkids, two grandparents, one perfect Saturday ❤️ Grandpa and Grandma with all of their babies on the front porch. Biloxi sunsets hit different. #family #biloxi #grandparents #blessed
Coffee on the porch with Skeeter this morning, watched the street wake up.
Cut the shelves for Janelle's garage today — oak for honesty.
Walked the raised beds with my coffee; tomatoes and okra coming in.
Building committee meets first Saturday, 8 AM — painting day in November.
Sunday table: collards, cornbread, smothered chicken, peach cobbler.
Called Harold; we'll see each other at the family gathering.
Curtis fished the bayou with me — more about the company than the catch.
Amara and Isaiah helped in the workshop, small tasks and big grins.
Gospel and blues on the workshop radio, Sam Cooke when the mood needs it.
Neighborhood loop walk at 6:30; the knees complain in the damp.
Grilled on the Weber this weekend, cheated on the sodium a little.
CPAP data review with Dr. Pham in November — hate the mask but wear it.
Built a gabled birdhouse, cedar for the smell, gave it away.
Doreen and I bickered about the thermostat, agreed on everything else.
Sun Herald over morning coffee, two cups black by 6.
Home Depot run for saw blades — brand-loyal and slow to buy.
Tithe to Shiloh Baptist; faith the quiet backbone of the week.
Braves on cable tonight, the Saints come Sunday.
Made Mama's gumbo — the weight of home in a pot.
Grandkids over for the weekend, garden and workshop lessons.
Roof's held fine since Zeta, AC newer, the truck runs clean.
Waffle House Saturday, the usual order.
Fixed the porch rocker; the rockers face the street on purpose.
Okra because Mama grew it, herbs by the back door.
